settingSubtitle: Route outgoing documents through a polished mail relay.
settingPresetHint: Choose a provider or bring your own relay.
settingRelayHint: Credentials are stored only in this plugin on the current device.
settingSecuritySslHint: Only SSL/TLS encrypted connections are supported.
settingFromPlaceholder: Display name shown in the From field
dialogSubtitle: Confirm recipients and choose how this document leaves SiYuan.
dialogModeBodyDesc: Best for readable HTML mail with embedded images.
dialogModeAttachmentDesc: Exports Markdown or ZIP assets for archival delivery.
dialogRecipientsHint: Use commas or spaces between multiple addresses.
dialogReadyHint: SMTP settings are required before delivery.
dialogSendHint: Body mode sends rendered HTML. Attachment mode exports Markdown or ZIP assets.
noConfigError: Please configure SMTP settings in plugin settings first
notElectronError: This feature is only available in the SiYuan desktop client
